_README: Generic outward channels the Diplomat may post invitations to wherever agents are welcome. Set enabled=true and fill url to activate one. type 'webhook' POSTs JSON {<content_field>: <invitation text>}; works with Discord (https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...), Slack, Mattermost, or any custom endpoint. Add headers/extra_fields as needed. Nothing posts while enabled=false.
